caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a distinctive tall, silver, textured wig, a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and white suspenders. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black broadcast microphone. The background is a room decorated with various framed photos and clothing items, including garments with the word "LEE" visible. Across the bottom of the scene, there are logos and text that read "THE GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position and attire, speaking with slight movements of his mouth and facial expressions, while the camera remains static. The overall lighting is bright, and the background remains consistent throughout the short clip.
